challenge_summary: The plan is structurally solid, but reliability execution is under-specified where outages actually occur: rollback mechanics, resource-level recovery mapping to RTO/RPO, and operational detection/response controls.
compact_for_parent: Pass 2 (architecture-reliability) | HIGH | 2 must_fix, 6 should_fix | Key: Phase rollback undefined; RTO/RPO not operationalized

issues.title: Phased deployment has no executable rollback contract per phase
issues.description: No phase-by-phase rollback criteria, rollback commands, checkpoint outputs, or re-entry semantics are defined.
issues.suggested_mitigation: Add a rollback matrix per phase: pre-checks, success criteria, rollback trigger, exact rollback command set, preserved state artifacts.

issues.title: RTO/RPO targets are not implemented as resource-level recovery procedures
issues.description: Requirements define RTO 24h and RPO 12h, but the plan does not map these targets to concrete restore paths for each dependency.
issues.artifact_section: Overview; Security Configuration > SQL Security; Deployment Phases
issues.suggested_mitigation: Add a DR execution table with per-resource backup source, restore method, time budget, validation checks.

issues.title: VNet and private DNS topology has no pre-defined failover-region design
issues.suggested_mitigation: Document a standby network pattern for germanywestcentral.

issues.title: Standard_LRS storage choice is not reconciled with workload-level RPO objective
issues.suggested_mitigation: Parameterize production redundancy (LRS vs ZRS/GRS) and add blob backup/export cadence.

issues.title: Autoscale policy is CPU-only and capped at 3 without validation gate
issues.suggested_mitigation: Add multi-metric autoscale (CPU + response time) and pre-peak load-test gate.

issues.title: Health endpoint gate exists but health probe configuration is incomplete
issues.suggested_mitigation: Define healthCheckPath in siteConfig, probe thresholds, and availability tests.

issues.title: Observability design collects telemetry but lacks actionable reliability alerting
issues.suggested_mitigation: Define alert rule catalog and action groups with SLO-linked thresholds.

issues.title: External dependency resilience patterns are not included in implementation handoff
issues.suggested_mitigation: Add acceptance criteria for integration resilience (timeouts, retries, circuit breakers).

issues.title: Certificate lifecycle and TLS renewal path is not documented
issues.suggested_mitigation: Document certificate source, renewal automation, expiry alerts, and DR rebind steps.
